'''Yulant''' was an agricultural [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] owned by the [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation]] who sued [[Dasobo Meats]], a meat shipping company based on the planet. It was one of the worlds on the [[Agricultural Circuit|Ag Circuit]]. Approximately six months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], workers here revolted against increased [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] control.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|business/13516_3.html|Salliche Ag Sues Dasobo Meats for Gornt Copying}}
